_comment: Index of GrowthStackr short-form SFX. Every sound in assets/sfx/ has one entry here; compositions reference sounds by `id`. The entries below are EXAMPLE / PLACEHOLDER records — their `file` paths point at audio that is NOT added yet. Replace with real cleared audio and log each in licenses/sfx-licenses.md before use. Schema per entry: id, file, category, intensity, duration_ms, best_for, avoid_for, license, feeling. See README.md for the beat -> SFX mapping and volume rules (SFX ride 0.14-0.32, under the voice).

sfx.license: PLACEHOLDER — not yet added; commercial-cleared source required
